title: VISOR: Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Iterative Search and Over-horizon Reasoning

defines.name: VISOR
defines.definition: A unified single-agent framework for visual retrieval-augmented generation that combines structured evidence accumulation, visual action correction, and dynamic context management for long-horizon reasoning.

problem: Existing agentic VRAG systems struggle with scattered visual evidence across pages, unreliable fine-grained visual actions, and search drift caused by long visual contexts.
